fileLevelNodes.name: 20260101000000_baseline.sql
fileLevelNodes.summary: Baseline schema migration that provisions the entire Vayl backend: extensions (pgcrypto, uuid-ossp, pg_cron), helper functions, and the 10 core tables (user_profiles, couples, pairing_codes, curated_sessions, desire_ratings, desire_matches, card_progress, assessment_responses/results, couple_session_records) with RLS policies scoped to couple membership.

fileLevelNodes.name: user_profiles
fileLevelNodes.summary: Per-user profile keyed by auth_id, storing onboarding state, NM flavor/stage, pairing code, couple linkage, orientation and role preferences. The pivot table linking Supabase auth identities to couple-scoped data.

fileLevelNodes.name: couples
fileLevelNodes.summary: Couple record joining two user_profiles (user_a, user_b) with a shared safe word and a matches_revealed flag; the central scoping entity that most RLS policies and foreign keys reference.

fileLevelNodes.name: pairing_codes
fileLevelNodes.summary: Short-lived invite codes for two-device pairing, tracking creator, expiry, and who claimed the code into which couple. RLS allows the creator to manage their row and a non-creator to claim it.

fileLevelNodes.name: curated_sessions
fileLevelNodes.summary: Two-device curated card-session state: deck/variant, card list, per-card and global timers, per-partner presence/bandwidth/consent flags, reveal state, and safe-word usage. A unique partial index enforces one open session per couple.

fileLevelNodes.name: desire_ratings
fileLevelNodes.summary: Per-user rating of an individual desire_item, the raw input that feeds Desire Map match computation.

fileLevelNodes.name: desire_matches
fileLevelNodes.summary: Computed alignment between partners on a desire item: alignment level, each partner's value, gap size, and an optional bridge card. The couple-facing output of the Desire Map.

fileLevelNodes.name: card_progress
fileLevelNodes.summary: Per-couple status of each card (e.g. discussed/skipped), used to track deck progression across a couple's sessions.

fileLevelNodes.name: couple_session_records
fileLevelNodes.summary: Historical log of completed couple sessions with start/end timestamps and count of cards discussed.

fileLevelNodes.name: assessment_responses
fileLevelNodes.summary: Per-user raw answers to onboarding assessment questions, keyed by question_key.

fileLevelNodes.name: assessment_results
fileLevelNodes.summary: Per-user derived assessment results (result_key/result_value pairs) computed from assessment_responses.

fileLevelNodes.name: 20260616223000_p5d_revoke_anon_default_privileges.sql
fileLevelNodes.summary: Security-hardening migration (P5d) that revokes the anon role from default privileges on future tables, functions, and sequences in the public schema, and drops a residual anon EXECUTE grant on set_curated_sessions_updated_at(), closing the future-object exposure gap left by P5b.

fileLevelNodes.name: 20260617000000_desire_map_backend.sql
fileLevelNodes.summary: Desire Map backend migration that creates the desire_map_status table (per-couple track + per-partner completion + full-reveal gating) and extends desire_ratings (rating check constraint) and desire_matches (is_free_reveal, revealed_at) to support the reveal flow.

fileLevelNodes.name: desire_map_status
fileLevelNodes.summary: Per-couple Desire Map progress: which track, each partner's completion timestamp, whether the full reveal is unlocked, and a waiting-state marker. Drives the gated reveal experience.

fileLevelNodes.name: 20260617120000_monetization_entitlements.sql
fileLevelNodes.summary: Monetization migration that creates the service-role-only entitlements ledger (couple_id, product_id, is_active, purchased_by) with RLS and a couple_id index, and adds the denormalized access_tier / core_unlocked_at / is_founding_member cache columns to couples.

fileLevelNodes.name: entitlements
fileLevelNodes.summary: Service-role-only purchase ledger granting a couple an entitlement (product_id, is_active, expires_at, purchased_by). Source of truth for the couple's paid access tier; never exposed to clients.

fileLevelNodes.name: 20260617130000_entitlement_payer_portable_resolution.sql
fileLevelNodes.summary: Defines two payer-portable resolution functions: resolve_couple_access_tier (reader returning 'core'/'free' from active entitlements matched by couple_id OR purchaser identity) and recompute_couple_entitlement (writer that refreshes the couples access_tier/founding/unlocked-at cache from the ledger), both locked to service_role.

fileLevelNodes.name: assessment_questions.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Seed bank of ENM-readiness assessment questions (scale and multi-select), each tagged with a domain, weight, and sort order, consumed via ContentLoader.loadAssessmentQuestions(). Several entries are flagged as placeholders pending validated content.

fileLevelNodes.name: cards.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card-session content deck: education, prompt, and educationPrompt cards keyed to a category_id, with speaking-turn, difficulty, sensitivity, and free/paid gating. Loaded through ContentLoader.loadCards() to drive the couple card experience.

fileLevelNodes.name: categories.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Category taxonomy for the Learn/card content (communication, boundaries, intimacy, etc.) with SF Symbol icons, phase grouping, card counts, and unlock gating. Loaded via ContentLoader.loadCategories() to organize and gate content sections.

fileLevelNodes.name: desire_items.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Desire Map item catalog: per-item name, description, category, sensitivity, track membership (curious/established), and track-specific answer scales. Decoded into the DesireItem model via ContentLoader.loadDesireItems() to populate the Desire Map rater.

fileLevelNodes.name: config.toml
fileLevelNodes.summary: Supabase CLI config registering the lookup-code and create-pair edge functions with JWT verification enabled and their Deno import maps.

fileLevelNodes.name: index.ts
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): marks a partner's Desire Map complete, resolves the couple track, and when both finish computes positive matches over shared items (excluding boundaries) into desire_matches with one server-authoritative free reveal.

fileLevelNodes.name: .npmrc
fileLevelNodes.summary: Placeholder npm registry configuration comment for the create-pair edge function's private package imports.

fileLevelNodes.name: deno.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno import map for the create-pair edge function, aliasing the Supabase functions-js JSR package.

fileLevelNodes.name: index.ts
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): validates a pairing code (existence, expiry, self-pair, prior-couple guards), creates a couples row, marks both profiles linked, and consumes the code.

fileLevelNodes.name: index.ts
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): returns only the linked partner's display name and pronouns for the caller's couple, since per-row RLS cannot expose cross-partner columns.

fileLevelNodes.name: index.ts
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): the only path that grants Core to a couple, authorizing via Apple StoreKit receipt or an admin secret, writing the entitlements ledger, then recomputing the couple's access_tier.

fileLevelNodes.name: .npmrc
fileLevelNodes.summary: Placeholder npm registry configuration comment for the lookup-code edge function's private package imports.

fileLevelNodes.name: deno.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno import map for the lookup-code edge function, aliasing the Supabase functions-js JSR package.

fileLevelNodes.name: index.ts
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno edge function (service-role): validates a pairing code's existence and expiry and returns the inviter's display name and pronouns for the 'you're pairing with...' preview.

fileLevelNodes.name: index.ts
fileLevelNodes.summary: Deno edge function (slug rapid-task, the app's create-couple endpoint): claims a pairing code, resolves both partners' profile ids, creates the couples row, links both profiles, inherits any payer-portable entitlement, and deletes the code.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppShell.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Root authenticated container view that switches between the Home, Play, Map, and Learn tabs and anchors the RacetrackTabBar above the home indicator.

fileLevelNodes.name: ModelContainer.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Defines the SwiftData SchemaV1 (the single registry of all @Model types) and the app's disk-backed and in-memory ModelContainer factories.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppAnimation.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Design-token namespace of all named SwiftUI animations and ambient durations (reactive springs, OB card physics, looping shimmers) plus Reduce-Motion-safe helpers.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppColors.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Central color-token system (void/surfaces/text/accent/feedback/shadows and spectrum gradient stops) that all views must reference instead of raw colors, with Color hex helpers.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppElevation.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Elevation/shadow token namespace plus cardElevation/modalElevation view modifiers that apply the correct shadow stack for the current color scheme.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppFonts.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Typography token system mapping semantic roles (heroTitle, cardTitle, bodyText, ctaLabel) to the ClashDisplay and Switzer faces with display/body constructors for custom sizes.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppGlows.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Glow-effect token namespace and view modifiers (spectrumBorderGlow, cornerDeckGlow, safetyGlow) so views express glows through tokens instead of raw shadows.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppGrid.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Layout-grid token struct defining column counts, gutters, and grid math used to align content to the app's spacing system.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppLayout.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: GeometryProxy-derived layout resolver exposing screen/card/safe-area metrics and the mandatory OB and session card sizing helpers, replacing all UIScreen.main usage.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppRadius.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Semantic corner-radius token namespace (micro through sheet, plus OB-only obCard/cornerCard/foilEdge) that every clip and rounded-rectangle must reference.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppRootView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Top-level routing gate that shows the splash once per cold launch, then reactively routes to onboarding, sign-in, or AppShell based on AppState and AuthService.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppSafeArea.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Safe-area utilities: a real-safe-area environment key and AppLayout extension so views can read true device insets without UIScreen, with helper view modifiers.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppSpacing.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Semantic spacing token namespace (xxs through xxl on an 8pt grid) that every padding, gap, and offset must reference instead of raw numbers.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppTheme.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Defines the ThemeMode enum (system/light/dark) retained for persistence after the app was hard-locked to dark and the legacy AppPalette was removed.

fileLevelNodes.name: DragDebugView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: DEBUG-only isolated drag-gesture test view: a draggable circle plus an event log to confirm DragGesture fires and hit-testing is not blocked.

fileLevelNodes.name: AcknowledgementRecord.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model recording that a user tapped through the 3-card ground-rules modal in The Opener; a device-only legal/ethical record with copy versioning.

fileLevelNodes.name: Card.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Read-only Codable content model for a single prompt card loaded from JSON, with derived flags (reveal mechanic, context beat, ceremonial, living) plus The Opener sample data.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardSession.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Models for deck-play tracking: couple-owned CardSession, per-card CardResult outcomes, and the unlinked-user SoloSession prep deck.

fileLevelNodes.name: CompanionCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Stub Codable model for a Desire Map companion card that bridges a match into a next-step conversation prompt and optional suggested deck.

fileLevelNodes.name: Couple.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model for a linked partner connection — owns the shared safe word, entitlement tier, Desire Map reveal state, and cascading session/match/progress relationships.

fileLevelNodes.name: Deck.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Read-only Codable content model for a deck loaded from JSON, with entitlement gating, gender-dynamic card filtering, ordering, and ritual-presence helpers.

fileLevelNodes.name: DeckProgress.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model tracking a couple's resume position through a deck across sittings (current card index, unwrapped flag, first-opened/completed dates).

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireItem.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Codable model for a single cohort-adaptive Desire Map prompt loaded from JSON, with per-track answer strings (weight-ordered) and cohort-appearance helpers.

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireMatch.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model for a server-computed mutual/adjacent Desire Map match; reveal state and free-reveal flag are Edge-Function-authoritative to keep the paywall un-bypassable.

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireRating.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Models for the app's most sensitive data: per-user private DesireMapEntry ratings (notForMe never syncs) and the couple-level DesireMapStatus completion/reveal tracker.

fileLevelNodes.name: EntitlementRecord.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Models for purchase records: couple-level EntitlementRecord (Core unlock, founding-member, lifetime/expiry) and the permanent $7.99 ConnectionEntitlement.

fileLevelNodes.name: ThemeManager.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Holds the app-wide color-scheme mode as an @Observable store, persisting it to UserDefaults and force-pinning Act 1 to the dark Midnight palette.

fileLevelNodes.name: ThemeModifiers.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: ViewModifiers and View extensions for the design system: themedRoot (color-scheme binding), themedCard (card surface), and a conditional `if` helper.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylPrimitives.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Tier-1 raw color palette (UIColor hex/RGB anchors) whose only permitted consumer is AppColors; also defines the internal UIColor(hex:) initializer.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylApp.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: App entry point and composition root: constructs the shared AppState and injects it into the store graph, wires environment objects, and runs session/entitlement bootstrap on launch.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppIconRetreival.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Fully commented-out dev utility that once rendered and exported VaylAppIcon to PNG files at standard icon sizes; currently inert dead code.

fileLevelNodes.name: Contents.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Asset catalog manifest defining the app's universal AccentColor color set.

fileLevelNodes.name: Contents.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Asset catalog manifest declaring the universal app icon image set for iOS.

fileLevelNodes.name: Contents.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Root asset catalog manifest carrying Xcode authoring metadata for Assets.xcassets.

fileLevelNodes.name: Contents.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Asset catalog manifest registering the custom 'gender-man' SF Symbol used in onboarding gender selection.

fileLevelNodes.name: Contents.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Asset catalog manifest registering the custom 'gender-non-binary' SF Symbol used in onboarding gender selection.

fileLevelNodes.name: Contents.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Asset catalog manifest registering the custom 'gender-trans' SF Symbol used in onboarding gender selection.

fileLevelNodes.name: Contents.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Asset catalog manifest registering the custom 'gender-woman' SF Symbol used in onboarding gender selection.

fileLevelNodes.name: DiagnosticOverlay.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: DEBUG-only suite of layout-diagnostic overlays (screen ruler, CTA position marker, safe-area bands, position reporter) for verifying OB canvas geometry on device.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppAccessEnums.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Defines monetization access enums: AccessTier (free/core/pro), ConnectionPlan, and the one-time Milestone events that fire visible in-app moments.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppCardEnums.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card and deck taxonomy enums: CardType mechanics, CardIntensity (8 levels with sorting + difficulty mapping), CardStatus, WhoStarts, GenderDynamic, DeckCategory.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppDesireEnums.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Desire Map enums: DesireMapState (home indicator), DesireRatingValue (4-point weight with the sacred notForMe boundary), and DesireMatchType.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppEnums.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Core onboarding/routing and UI enums: NMStage, AppMode, EmotionalRegister, AgencySignal, MotivationShape, RelationshipContext, plus PartnerChipState and the AppIcons SF Symbol registry.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppOBEnums.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding-canvas-exclusive enums: OBPhase sequence, OBCredential, DemoVerb, OpenerDeckType, AgeRange, RelationshipTenure, and the AppDealerTyping timing engine.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppPulseEnums.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pulse check-in enums: PulseSource, InsightType, PulseCapacityColor, PulseTier (score-to-tier with color/label), and PulseWindow (time-range filtering for the pulse graph).

fileLevelNodes.name: AppTab.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The four-tab navigation enum (home/play/map/learn) providing SF Symbol icon names and display labels for the main tab bar.

fileLevelNodes.name: UserDefaultsKey.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Single source of truth for raw UserDefaults key strings (currently the onboarding-completion launch-routing mirror) to prevent duplicate-literal desyncs across layers.

fileLevelNodes.name: LockInSession.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model recording the pre-session emotional bandwidth check-in for both partners; device-only, computes bandwidth gap once on write and exposes significance helpers.

fileLevelNodes.name: MilestoneRecord.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model recording a one-time milestone completion per user; device-only, holds optional Beacon item IDs for the research-orbs milestone.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseEntry.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Plain Codable struct for one pulse check-in (capacity score + Q1–Q5 answers) cached in UserDefaults via PulseStore; includes a tier accessor and rich preview data.

fileLevelNodes.name: SessionRecord.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model for one completed or safe-worded play session (category, difficulty, prompts shown, duration) with a cascade-delete relationship to its RatingRecords.

fileLevelNodes.name: UserProfile.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The central SwiftData @Model — one record per person created at onboarding's end; the durable source of truth for all onboarding/routing data, link state, and Desire Map completion.

fileLevelNodes.name: DataStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Central SwiftData persistence layer wrapping a ModelContext; every session/rating/streak/profile read and write goes through here. Also holds transitional RatingRecord/StreakRecord stub models.

fileLevelNodes.name: ModelContext+Extensions.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: ModelContext extension adding saveWithLogging() — the project-wide replacement for silent try? context.save(), logging and rethrowing every failure via OSLog.

fileLevelNodes.name: AppState.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Root @Observable @MainActor app-level state owning the onboarding gate, link state, app mode, couple id and tab routing; the single writer of onboarding completion across truth/surface/cache.

fileLevelNodes.name: AuthService.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: @Observable @MainActor Sign in with Apple service over Supabase — handles nonce generation, the ASAuthorization delegate flow, session checks, sign-out, and guarantees a remote profile row on auth.

fileLevelNodes.name: ContentLoader.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Static helper for reading bundled read-only JSON content (decks, cards, categories, desire items); all methods throw on failure rather than fatalError, with snake-case decoding.

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireSyncService.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: @MainActor service pushing private desire-map ratings to Supabase (batch upsert), invoking the compute-desire-matches edge function, and reading back client-safe matches and couple status.

fileLevelNodes.name: EntitlementService.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Service layer for couple-level entitlements (Monetization M1) — reads the denormalized couples.access_tier and grants Core via the server-authoritative grant-entitlement edge function.

fileLevelNodes.name: LegalLinks.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Single source of truth for the app's Terms and Privacy URLs (currently Apple placeholder pages) plus the LegalDoc enum that drives the legal-document sheet in the paywall and sign-in.

fileLevelNodes.name: PairingService.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure data-access layer for partner linking over Supabase — generates/claims pairing codes, fetches the linked partner identity, and polls (via realtime channel + timeout) until the couple forms.

fileLevelNodes.name: ProfileService.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: @MainActor Supabase profile service — fetch-or-create the remote user_profiles row, scoped pairing-code lookups (name+pronouns only), identity/NM-stage updates, and profile-id resolution caching.

fileLevelNodes.name: RealtimeSessionService.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure data-access transport for the two-device Curated Session over Supabase — curated_sessions CRUD, airlock column mutators, server-authoritative conditional advance, and a presence channel factory.

fileLevelNodes.name: StoreKitService.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: StoreKit 2 wrapper (Monetization M2) — loads the Core product, runs the purchase sheet returning a verified transaction + signed JWS, checks/restores ownership, and observes background transaction updates.

fileLevelNodes.name: SupabaseManager.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Singleton service that constructs and exposes the shared SupabaseClient configured from Config URL and anon key.

fileLevelNodes.name: SyncManager.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: ObservableObject service that pushes local profile, display identity, desire-map ratings, and onboarding state to Supabase and retries queued sync tasks.

fileLevelNodes.name: SplashScreenView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Animated brand splash screen that plays the Vayl wordmark/logo reveal then transitions to a generic destination view.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylAppIcon.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: In-code rendering of the Vayl app icon artwork (lattice wordmark plus starfield) usable as a SwiftUI view for previews and export.

fileLevelNodes.name: CriticalButton.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable destructive/critical-action button component styled with the app's destructive feedback tokens.

fileLevelNodes.name: SafeWordButton.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Safe-word affordance button used in protected session contexts, styled with the safety accent and glow tokens.

fileLevelNodes.name: SelectablePill.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Selectable pill/chip control used for single- and multi-select option lists, with animated border and shadow modifiers reflecting selection state.

fileLevelNodes.name: AtmosphericGhostDeck.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Decorative background view rendering a faint stacked ghost deck of cards to add atmosphere behind primary card content.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardBackView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Renders the back face of a card with two modes: a full interactive init for onboarding and a decorative deck-mode init for the home carousel.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardCarousel.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Interactive multi-phase card carousel (floating → spread → gathering → lifted) that animates a deck of cards and surfaces card actions to the host.

fileLevelNodes.name: CandleCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face that renders an animated candle/flame visualization via a Canvas-driven renderer, used as an expressive OB card surface.

fileLevelNodes.name: CompassCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face rendering a compass/heading-ruler instrument that deflects toward a value, used for directional selection interactions.

fileLevelNodes.name: CompassOptionCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Lightweight card face presenting a single compass option label, a variant surface in the compass selection flow.

fileLevelNodes.name: CompassSliderCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face combining the compass instrument with a slider affordance for continuous value selection.

fileLevelNodes.name: ContextCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face presenting an onboarding context prompt with a decorative book object illustration.

fileLevelNodes.name: ControllerCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face drawing a single game-controller illustration via ControllerPainter, signifying solo-controller play mode.

fileLevelNodes.name: ControllerPainter.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Shared stateless painter that draws the game-controller shape into a graphics context, reused by the single and dual controller card faces.

fileLevelNodes.name: DualControllerCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face drawing two game controllers via ControllerPainter, signifying paired two-device play mode.

fileLevelNodes.name: RadioTunerCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face rendering a radio-tuner dial metaphor for selecting along a continuous frequency-like scale.

fileLevelNodes.name: SlotMachineCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face rendering a slot-machine reel metaphor for a randomized/spin-style selection surface.

fileLevelNodes.name: SnapshotCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face presenting a static snapshot/summary surface, used to display a captured selection or result.

fileLevelNodes.name: TypewriterCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Card face presenting prompt text with an animated typewriter reveal effect.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardFrontView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Renders the front face shell of a card (size, corner radius, light/dark, arrow-trigger state) hosting card-face content.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardLayout.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Constants namespace defining standard card dimensions, corner radius, and horizontal margin used across card components.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardFlightScene.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SpriteKit scene that simulates physics-based card flight (dealing/throwing) for animated card transitions.

fileLevelNodes.name: PromptCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Simple prompt card displaying a card type, prompt text, and optional intensity label inside a PremiumCardShell.

fileLevelNodes.name: SettingsCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Generic reusable container that wraps Settings-screen content in padded rounded-card styling.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylCardAction.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Action enum describing the gestures and state changes a card face reports upward to Phases, which forward intents to VaylDirector.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylCardBack.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Canvas-rendered back face of a Vayl onboarding card: void base, atmosphere gradients, multi-pass VAYL wordmark, counter-rotated hex moire grid, and spectrum frames, with parameterized dissolution.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylCardCarousel.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Generic reusable card carousel rendering arbitrary card content in a stacked peek pile, with browse/exit gestures paired to the CarouselPhysics scroll engine.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylCardContent.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Public enum describing every content type a Vayl card face can render (portal, mode, context, curiosity, candle, compass, snapshot, and onboarding symbols), written onto VaylCardModel by the Director.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Front face of a Vayl card: owns the shell, spectrum diamond, corner marks, and question text, and routes VaylCardContent cases to their specific content-face builders.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylCardRenderer.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Single source of truth translating VaylCardModel physics state into pixels, applying all transforms and choosing VaylCardBack vs VaylCardFace by flip progress.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylDeckStack.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Renders a squared deck of six card backs at rest whose per-layer offsets mirror ConfirmationPhase exit positions, reused by CuriosityPhase and BuildDeckPhase.

fileLevelNodes.name: AuroraGlowField.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Warm Aurora atmospheric blob field of nine animated radial-gradient blobs for light-mode screens, with phase-drifted fade-in and looping sine modulation.

fileLevelNodes.name: FilamentMode.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Canvas-based three-orbit filament particle system: a state machine cycling parametric patterns and color sets across three trails, rendered with glow, core, and connection passes.

fileLevelNodes.name: FlameAura.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Canvas-based wisp-flame renderer where each wisp rises and wobbles via stacked sines and color-shifts magenta-to-purple, with wisp count and height driven by a selected intensity.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardMirrorDeal.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Mirror-deal card physics controller for the onboarding ModeSelectPhase, dealing two cards from opposite edges that land simultaneously, then handling lift, confirm, and reject animations.

fileLevelNodes.name: CarouselPhysics.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable orientation-agnostic 1-D scroll engine for card carousels, owning a continuous card-index position driven by display-synced SwiftUI springs.

fileLevelNodes.name: ThreeCardFanController.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Three-card-monte fan controller orchestrating SpriteKit deal flights, spread-turnover reveal, lift, and confirm physics for the candle/experience-level selection.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardRevealPillButton.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Toggleable pill-shaped selection button for card reveal options, scaling when selected with a staggered entrance and dimming sibling pills.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardShadows.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: View extension providing a reusable dual-shadow card modifier (accent color wash plus a black depth shadow), theme-aware.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardStyle.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable card-shell ViewModifier and convenience extension applying background, rounded clip, and border stroke to eliminate repetition.

fileLevelNodes.name: CategoryTileView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Home-screen category grid tile displaying an emoji, title, completion count, and progress bar with theme-aware styling.

fileLevelNodes.name: ConversationCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: 3D-flipping conversation card with a question/fuse-timer front and a response pill-grid back, managing flip state, pill selection, encouragement, and ghost-deck atmosphere.

fileLevelNodes.name: ConversationCardTypes.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Model types backing the conversation card: OBCard onboarding data, pill/response enums, content discriminators, and fuse/ghost-deck configuration.

fileLevelNodes.name: CuriosityCardBack.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Face-down side of the curiosity picker card rendering a laser-engraved maze texture with an embedded orbit animation that stops on flip.

fileLevelNodes.name: CuriosityFlipCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Generic 3D flip container for curiosity picker cards: a maze/orbit back face and caller-supplied front content, orchestrating the flip and orbit lifecycle.

fileLevelNodes.name: FuseTimerView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Canvas-drawn fuse/spark countdown timer that travels a glowing spark along a rounded-rectangle border with a progressive burn effect.

fileLevelNodes.name: PremiumCardShell.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Generic glass-morphic card container wrapping arbitrary content in an eight-layer premium composition with optional fuse-burn progress animation.

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeGlowField.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Full-page atmospheric background for the Home dashboard that crossfades from drifting glow blobs (morphProgress 0) to a deep-space galaxy with stars and blooms (morphProgress 1) as the user scrolls.

fileLevelNodes.name: LightAuraBloom.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Light-mode analogue of FlameAura: Canvas-drawn layered warm blobs (rose, peach, gold, lavender) that rise and breathe above a selected pill on cream backgrounds, scaled by the pill's intensity.

fileLevelNodes.name: LightModeShimmer.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Light-mode foil shimmer matching HolographicShimmer's energy on cream surfaces using two offset diagonal gradient sweeps in a warm purple/magenta/gold palette with screen blending.

fileLevelNodes.name: MazePatternView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Concentric engraved maze-ring pattern (rings with gaps plus radial spokes) rendered in multiple stroke layers for a debossed look, with a co-centered TileOrbitView comet orbit at its core.

fileLevelNodes.name: OrbitSpark.metal
fileLevelNodes.summary: Metal fragment shader that draws a single comet-like spark orbiting a rounded-rectangle border, using a signed-distance border mask and a time-driven angular sweep with mode-switchable dark/light spectrum colors.

fileLevelNodes.name: OrbitSparkBorderView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftUI wrapper that strokes a rounded-rectangle border with the spectrum gradient and applies the orbitSpark Metal colorEffect, animating the spark via TimelineView elapsed time and passing a palette mode for dark/light.

fileLevelNodes.name: PillBorder.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: View-extension modifiers (.pillBorder / .magentaGoldBorder) that add a crisp spectrum or warm gradient stroke plus a blurred outward glow duplicate to selected/active pill surfaces.

fileLevelNodes.name: SectionHeader.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Trivial all-caps muted section label used above sections in Settings, Home, and list screens.

fileLevelNodes.name: SparkField.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Campfire-ember particle system for light-mode onboarding screens: per-screen tuned configurations drive a Canvas of rising, drifting, life-cycled warm sparks composited below content.

fileLevelNodes.name: SpectrumHairline.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Shared spectrum hairline accents: a flat fading cyan-purple-magenta line and a tapered lens/spindle variant (thickest at center, sharp points at the ends) used as on-brand sheet edge accents.

fileLevelNodes.name: TileOrbitView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Purpose-built comet-orbit animation for small tile contexts (44-88pt): resting static arcs or TimelineView-driven comet orbits whose phase offsets and color cycling keep heads and hues from ever colliding.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylBorderEffect.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The animated spectrum pill border for VaylButton: a tapered hairline at rest that fills with a two-sided crisp-plus-halo spectrum stroke on press, with an outward-only glow achieved via destinationOut masking.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylButton.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The app's primary CTA button: a holographic-shimmer pill with the animated VaylBorderEffect, choreographing press-down haptics, border fill, and a precisely scheduled post-fill glow burst on release.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylFlourishView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Signature decorative flourish: two gradient-stroked paths that orbit and meet at a single center node, encoding duality and connection, breathing gently via an ambient pulse animation.

fileLevelNodes.name: InteractiveField.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable icon-plus-TextField input row with a color-scheme-adaptive background, subtle border, and a soft accent shadow in dark mode.

fileLevelNodes.name: ToggleRow.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Trivial icon-plus-label-plus-Toggle row used in Settings sections, bound to an external isOn state.

fileLevelNodes.name: FoilDeckTheme.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure data model defining a deck's visual identity for the FoilOpen sealed-case ceremony: a three-stop colorway ramp plus the deck name embossed on the case front.

fileLevelNodes.name: MetallicCaseView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The FoilOpen ceremony's reusable 3D tuck-box: a Canvas projects a painter-sorted anodized-metal box whose front face carries a debossed hex lattice lit by the hexFoilSurface Metal shader, then choreographs rise, knock, tap-to-crack, tear propagation, and shatter-dissolve.

fileLevelNodes.name: SpectrumSparkField.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Stateless spectrum-mote particle field for the FoilOpen ceremony: TimelineView-driven, seeded-deterministic spark bursts knocked loose by a strike on the case, popping outward then drifting up like embers.

fileLevelNodes.name: GlowOrb.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Small reusable radial-gradient glow orb whose ambient opacity adapts to the color scheme (emissive in dark, barely-there in light); decorative and non-interactive.

fileLevelNodes.name: GlowUnderline.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: ViewModifier that overlays a breathing three-layer spectrum glow underline (solid core, tight neon, wide bloom) beneath its content, with a flash parameter to dim it on interaction.

fileLevelNodes.name: GlowUnderlineView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Standalone View variant of the breathing spectrum glow underline (solid core, neon glow, wide bloom) for cases that compose the underline directly rather than as a modifier.

fileLevelNodes.name: GradBadge.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Small capsule pill with a spectrum gradient border and a text label, used for metadata counts, status tags, and category chips — never for CTAs.

fileLevelNodes.name: HolographicShimmer.metal
fileLevelNodes.summary: Metal shader library of stitchable fragment effects: oil-slick orb iridescence, Voronoi and folded-simplex caustics, specular sweeps, a holographic foil surface, and the debossed hex-lattice foil that fronts the MetallicCaseView tuck-box.

fileLevelNodes.name: HolographicShimmer.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure-SwiftUI (Canvas, no Metal) holographic pill background: a noise-driven specular sweep, five screen-blended drifting orbs, vignette, and two fbm grain layers, used as the VaylButton fill.

fileLevelNodes.name: NavArrow.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Adaptive onboarding back/forward nav-arrow component family: a custom chevron Shape rendered as a spectrum-gradient stroked pill, with dark and light variants unified behind a colorScheme-aware OnboardingNavArrow wrapper.

fileLevelNodes.name: OBSheetChrome.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Shared ViewModifier giving the onboarding custom sheets native-style chrome: full-bleed dark surface with continuous rounded top corners and a spectrum border that traces the top edge and dissolves down the sides.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingFooter.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Small footer label shown beneath the CTA on onboarding screens, carrying privacy/encryption reassurance copy at minimum-legible Dynamic Type size.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingNavBar.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable onboarding top row pairing an optional circular back button with a centered OnboardingProgressBar; used at the head of every onboarding screen showing navigation.

fileLevelNodes.name: RacetrackTabBar.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Main app tab bar binding to AppTab: a capsule of icon pills with a sequenced racetrack-trim border animation (old pill erases while new pill draws) over a shimmering glass background.

fileLevelNodes.name: SafariView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Thin UIViewControllerRepresentable wrapper over SFSafariViewController for presenting hosted legal web pages in-app via a sheet.

fileLevelNodes.name: TabContentWrapper.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Generic wrapper applied to every tab's content that adds bottom scroll inset, a gradient fade mask, and indicator inset so content dissolves cleanly behind the floating tab bar.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingProgressBar.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Heavily-tuned onboarding progress bar with a gradient fill, traveling shimmer, and a multi-layer Canvas bloom + particle completion effect; ships extracted pure-math helpers, a testable animation clock, and full accessibility/RTL/localization support.

fileLevelNodes.name: OrbitIndicator.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable three-state (pending → processing → complete) loading indicator drawing an animated comet-tail orbit via a TimelineView Canvas, with a gradient fill, glow, and holographic sheen for the complete state.

fileLevelNodes.name: ProgressBar.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Minimal value/max horizontal capsule progress bar filled with the spectrum border gradient.

fileLevelNodes.name: ProgressRingView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable circular progress ring with a spectrum-stroked arc and a centered percentage label, sized and weighted by init parameters.

fileLevelNodes.name: ScoreRing.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Animated score ring rendering a 0-100 score as an angular spectrum sweep with a centered numeric label that fills in on appear.

fileLevelNodes.name: ScreenshotProtectionModifier.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: ViewModifier that obscures private content with a material overlay when the screen is being captured or screenshotted, exposed via a screenshotProtected() View extension.

fileLevelNodes.name: SpectrumBar.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Trivial horizontal spectrum-gradient capsule used as a thin divider/accent bar.

fileLevelNodes.name: GradientText.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Static two-tone gradient text view (no animation), colorScheme-aware; the non-animated counterpart to LivingText's premium three-tone treatment.

fileLevelNodes.name: KeywordHighlightText.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Text view that builds an AttributedString highlighting specified keywords in accent colors (cyan/magenta/gold) against a base color for prompt emphasis.

fileLevelNodes.name: LivingText.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Premium animated tri-color 'breathing' headline text: a TimelineView layers screen-blended bloom glows and a subtle scale breath over a full-opacity spectrum core, with a static Reduce Motion fallback.

fileLevelNodes.name: SpectrumBulletRow.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Labeled list row marked by a flat spectrum disc with a periodic holographic specular sweep; intentionally not a checkmark so lists read as possibilities rather than guaranteed deliverables.

fileLevelNodes.name: SignInView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Sign-in screen presenting the Vayl wordmark, a Sign in with Apple CTA wired to AuthService, loading/error states, and tappable Terms/Privacy links that open in an in-app SafariView sheet.

fileLevelNodes.name: CompanionCardStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Stub @Observable @MainActor Store that maps a couple's DesireMatches to companion cards pointing at a conversation or deck to open together; returns placeholder content until real companion data and deck mapping are wired.

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireMapStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: @Observable @MainActor Store for the Desire Map rater: resolves the cohort track from the local SwiftData profile, loads track items, upserts one DesireMapEntry per (userId, itemId), marks the profile complete, and best-effort syncs on completion.

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireRevealStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: @Observable @MainActor Store for the D4 reveal: fetches the couple's alignment-only matches via DesireSyncService and resolves the free/locked split against the EntitlementStore (the conversion gate).

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireMapView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: View layer for the two-track Desire Map card rater: reads DesireMapStore, presents one desire per card with four cohort-driven answers, routes between rater/completion/empty states, and is screenshot-protected.

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireRevealView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: View layer for the D4 reveal 'magic moment': reads DesireRevealStore, celebrates aligned matches with staggered reveal animations, shows locked teasers with a price-hint unlock CTA, and is screenshot-protected.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardChestContainer.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Home-tab container hosting the card deck carousel that morphs between a floating hero state and a framed glass 'chest' (ambient orbs, rim light, matched-geometry header, progress bar) as the carousel phase changes.

fileLevelNodes.name: GettingStartedPathView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The expanded 'Path' overlay listing the couple's first steps to their reveal; destination of the matched-geometry morph from GettingStartedEntryCard, presented over a blurred Home.

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeDashboardView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The main Home dashboard view: composes the greeting, card chest/carousel hero, desire-map indicator, reflection card, pick-up list, partner chip, and ambient prism/constellation zones into the scrolling home surface with a choreographed entrance.

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeGateView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Retired-from-routing gate screen that pitched the Desire Map as 'step 1 of 2' with a privacy info card and a choreographed entrance; kept on disk but no longer in the Home routing flow.

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeRouterView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Thin Home routing view: owns appState/modelContext, constructs HomeStore, and switches on store.homeState to render the dashboard while hosting the session sheet, desire-map rater, reveal cover, Path overlay, and completion beat.

fileLevelNodes.name: MapCompletionBeatView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: A brief one-shot celebration beat shown over the Home dashboard the moment the user finishes their Desire Map; tap to continue, reusing the reveal's prism emblem motif.

fileLevelNodes.name: ConstellationNode.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The Learn 'constellation' visualization: a model for stat/term nodes plus the floating, tappable node views, proximity connection lines, a detail bottom sheet, and the container ConstellationView.

fileLevelNodes.name: LearnView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Placeholder Learn tab screen showing only a 'Learn' title over the page background; the real Learn content hub is not yet built.

fileLevelNodes.name: MapView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Temporary Map tab harness that renders PairingSettingsView for partner-linking verification; to be replaced by the real Map / Desire Map implementation.

fileLevelNodes.name: PrismView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The Map-tab 'prism' widget: a mode-switching surface (Journal / Reflect / Agreements) with time-aware prompts, a solo-card draw, cursor-blink journaling, and expandable agreement rows, wrapped in the HomeWidgetShell chrome.

fileLevelNodes.name: EntitlementStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Monetization Store: the central @Observable read surface for the couple's access tier (isCore/tier), OR-ing the couple's server tier with local StoreKit ownership, and driving purchase/restore and background transaction updates.

fileLevelNodes.name: PaywallSheet.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The reusable Vayl paywall: one Core-scoped bottom sheet ($24.99 one-time, both unlock) presented from three doors (reveal / settings / play-deck) whose only difference is the hook header; purchase and restore run through EntitlementStore.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardFlightEngine.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding card-deal engine: owns the OB card landing-slot pool and bridges SwiftUI to the SpriteKit CardFlightScene, flying card-back snapshots from off-screen to natural resting slots and returning their final offset/angle.

fileLevelNodes.name: DesireMapIndicator.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Dashboard component that renders the couple's Desire Map status across its many states (youDone, bothReady, freeRevealSeen, redoInProgress) with state-specific cards and CTAs.

fileLevelNodes.name: GettingStartedEntryCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Compact dashboard entry card ('Your first steps') showing onboarding-path progress; carries the matched-geometry source that morphs into the full Path overlay when tapped.

fileLevelNodes.name: GravLiftView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Decorative tractor-beam 'grav lift' effect (layered cones, halo, and scan lines) that breathes with a phase input; non-interactive ambient visual behind the home hero card.

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeWidgetShell.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Reusable home-dashboard widget chrome: a generic container that wraps arbitrary content in a themed surface with inset shadows, a spectrum rim, and an underglow; also defines the OrbLayer ambient backdrop.

fileLevelNodes.name: PartnerChip.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Dashboard chip that renders the partner-presence affordance across states (no partner / invite-pending / active / multiple stub), using holographic shimmer for the invite states.

fileLevelNodes.name: PickUpCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Dashboard 'pick up where you left off' list card rendering in-progress content items (timeline, article, judgment, autopsy) with a pulsing activity dot and a see-all action.

fileLevelNodes.name: ReflectionBannerView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Bottom-sheet reflection capture banner shown after a session: lets the user pick feeling pills or write a note, toggle sharing with the partner, and submit; drag-to-dismiss.

fileLevelNodes.name: ReflectionCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Large dashboard reflection card rendering the full reflection lifecycle (pending / waiting-on-partner / both-reflected / summary) with a paged, swipeable layout and a pill-selection sheet.

fileLevelNodes.name: ResearchTicker.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Ambient, non-interactive ticker that cycles a curated list of CNM research facts, definitions, and reframes on a timer with a cross-fade.

fileLevelNodes.name: GettingStarted.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure Model-layer derivation of the post-onboarding 'first steps' activation: resolves the ordered step list and their states (done/active/upcoming/locked) from the couple's flags.

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeEventEngine.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure logic struct that selects the home greeting's two-line sub-copy from a prioritized list of HomeEvents (partner events → milestones → time/absence → stage defaults).

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeModels.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: View-layer Model definitions for the Home screen: the ReflectionCardState and HomeState routing enums, reflection pill groups, pick-up items, research facts, and the HomeEvent enum.

fileLevelNodes.name: HomeStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The Home feature's Store: an @Observable @MainActor brain that owns all routing state, derives HomeState/GettingStarted, loads profile/desire-status/deck-progress/reflection/deck data, and tracks the one-shot map-completion beat.

fileLevelNodes.name: CanvasEasing.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure easing-math namespace (normalise-in-window, cubic in-out, quint/sept ease-out) used to drive the OB canvas dissolution and physics curves.

fileLevelNodes.name: OBDeepCardFace.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Canvas + Metal-shader renderer for 'The Deep' OB card face revealed on flip during NamePhase: layered swirl, seeded particles, shimmer, depth-glow, and a caustics colorEffect.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingCanvasView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The single persistent OB canvas: a 10-layer ZStack (void → atmosphere → table → dealpoint → SpriteKit flight → cards → projected text → corner deck → phase overlay) plus the phase router switching on director.phase.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingStage.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Narrow @MainActor protocol exposing only the coordinator surface (onboardingData + dealer-line projection) that extracted phase sequencers need, keeping them decoupled from the full director.

fileLevelNodes.name: GenderSequencer.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Extracted @Observable store owning the entire Gender phase: dissolution/crystallisation curves, radio-tuner signal, gender + pronouns drums, and tap-lift→swipe-up confirm, writing the choice back through OnboardingStage.

fileLevelNodes.name: TableSurfaceView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Animatable single-pass Canvas that draws the entire Vayl card table (atmosphere, felt, vignette, topo contours with card dissolution warp/flow-around + forge sway, compass star, amber pool, spectrum rim arc).

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylDirector.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The central @Observable @MainActor OB coordinator: owns phase, all card collections + physics state, table fade, and the only advance() path; conforms to OnboardingStage and forwards to the projector, card-flight engine, and per-phase sequencers.

fileLevelNodes.name: CornerDeckView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Stateless top-right corner deck showing collected credential cards (max 7) as a stacked, slightly fanned pile of real VaylCardBack renders with a count label and receive-glow.

fileLevelNodes.name: DeckWrapView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: TimelineView-driven Canvas that spirals spectrum ribbons in a spinning helix around the rising BuildDeck 'forge' deck, drawing front strands bright and back strands dim.

fileLevelNodes.name: FounderLetterSheet.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Shared generic sheet chrome (spectrum grab handle + obSheetChrome) for the founder letter, used identically at BuildDeck's peek detent and FounderLetterPhase's full expansion so the phase swap is invisible.

fileLevelNodes.name: HandBackFollow.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure feel-math namespace for the shared 'lift → swipe up to hand back' affordance: tanh-banded lateral drift, stiffened upward follow with a soft ceiling, and a slight drift tilt — tuned from one place.

fileLevelNodes.name: LiftHalo.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Single-source spectrum focus ring shown around a lifted OB card (blurred halo + crisp glowing stroke), reused as an overlay by every selection phase so the tap-to-lift look never drifts.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingAtmosphere.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Per-phase OB atmosphere: light mode composites AuroraGlowField + SparkField, dark mode renders an OBVoidBloom (tri-color bloom under a hard void mask), with a library of named AtmosphereConfig presets.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingLayout.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Shared proportional spacing constants for onboarding, expressed as fractions of live screen height/width (with a stepped nav-top) so the layout scales across the full iPhone device matrix.

fileLevelNodes.name: CardLandingSlot.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure model for one predefined card-deal landing zone: fractional center + angle with jitter fields, resolving to a concrete position/angle for any screen size.

fileLevelNodes.name: ContextOption.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure data + selection model for ContextPhase cards (solo/couple × curious/in-it): first-person 'I' option sets, plus a derivedRegister that is the sole downstream behavioural driver.

fileLevelNodes.name: CuriosityDeck.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure deterministic selection model for the CuriosityPhase sort deck: round-1 feeling hands keyed by mode × register and a fixed escalating round-2 milestone set, backed by a stable id→text catalog.

fileLevelNodes.name: CuriositySortCard.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Minimal Identifiable/Equatable model for a single CuriosityPhase sort card: stable id (the key written to OnboardingData), display text, and round number.

fileLevelNodes.name: DemoDictionary.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure mapping from the DemoPhase 'I [verb] [noun]' snapshot to an EmotionalRegister via noun keyword-stem categories modulated by the verb, defaulting to flexible — reviving the cut Compass Q3 signal.

fileLevelNodes.name: FoilTear.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Identifiable model for a single crack in the sealed BuildDeck case: face-local UV tap point, authored crack orientation, a stable procedural seed, and the strike timestamp.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingData.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Transient struct accumulating every onboarding answer (demo/name/gender/mode/experience/context/curiosity + derived opener deck) and the isReadyToComplete commit gate; written to UserProfile on completion.

fileLevelNodes.name: VaylCardModel.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: @Observable reference model for one OB canvas card: content (question/credential/face-up) plus full physics + layout state (position, rotation, scale, flip, elevation, opacity, zIndex, slot) written exclusively by VaylDirector.

fileLevelNodes.name: WelcomeDeck.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Equatable model for the forged starter deck revealed at the end of BuildDeck: real name/purpose/colorway derived from OpenerDeckType, plus a shared set of placeholder prompt cards pending the content pass.

fileLevelNodes.name: BuildDeckPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: OB BuildDeck phase View driving the multi-beat forge ceremony: the confirmed deck melts through the felt, the table works, a metallic case rises/floats, a three-strike crack ceremony shatters it into the forged WelcomeDeck reveal and founder-letter exit.

fileLevelNodes.name: ConfirmationPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: OB Confirmation phase View: deals the six credential cards out of the corner deck onto the felt along a bézier corner-sweep, opens per-card edit sheets on tap, and confirms via a fan-wide swipe-right that collapses into a deck and advances to BuildDeck.

fileLevelNodes.name: ContextPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding phase View — a browsable card carousel where the user swipes relationship-context cards, taps to confirm, and swipes up to commit the selection via VaylDirector.

fileLevelNodes.name: CredentialEditorSheet.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: In-canvas edit half-sheet (plus its custom CredentialEditorOverlay presenter) for revising a single onboarding credential during ConfirmationPhase, writing straight back to director.onboardingData.

fileLevelNodes.name: CuriosityPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding phase View rendering a two-round Tinder-style card-sort pile; the user sweeps left to discard or right to keep, with all sort state owned by director.curiosity.

fileLevelNodes.name: DemoPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding phase View for the user's first card — a sentence-completion ("I [verb] [noun].") that teaches tap-to-lift and swipe-to-seal while triangulating an EmotionalRegister committed via director.commitDemoSnapshot.

fileLevelNodes.name: ExperienceLevelPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding phase View dealing three candle cards into a fan via ThreeCardFanController; tap lifts to reveal a level, swipe-up confirms and writes nmStage through director.commitExperienceLevel.

fileLevelNodes.name: FounderLetterPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Final onboarding phase View presenting the founder letter sheet; the pull-down completion gesture commits the whole onboarding via director.finishOnboarding(using: onboardingStore).

fileLevelNodes.name: GenderPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding phase View where a radio-tuner card crystallises from the felt and the user tunes gender + pronoun drums; near-pure renderer with all visual state on director.gender.

fileLevelNodes.name: ModeSelectPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Onboarding phase View dealing two solo/together cards from opposite sides via CardMirrorDealController; the user lifts one and swipes up to set appMode and advance to gender.

fileLevelNodes.name: NamePhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The flagship onboarding phase View — deals and flips the first card, runs the typewriter name input and greeting, and teaches the universal tap-lift then swipe-up hand-back gesture lesson.

fileLevelNodes.name: SingleGreetingSheet.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: An 'honest moment' overlay (SingleGreetingOverlay) shown when a user confirms 'I'm single' in ContextPhase, acknowledged via 'Got it' which commits the pending conclusion through director.continueFromSingleGreeting.

fileLevelNodes.name: StatPhase.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Early onboarding phase View presenting the '1 in 5' hero statistic with a holographic ignition entrance cascade and a citation expander, advancing on CTA.

fileLevelNodes.name: AnimatedSignature.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Native SwiftUI draw-on of the founder's three-stroke handwritten signature, each pen-stroke trim-animated with lift pauses and rendered in glow plus crisp spectrum passes.

fileLevelNodes.name: DealPointView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Stateless render of the OB deal point — the table-horizon origin from which all onboarding cards launch, its glow intensity driven by VaylDirector.

fileLevelNodes.name: ProjectedTextView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Stateless render of the dealer's voice — text typed character-by-character onto the felt at the table horizon, driven by VaylDirector's projected text state.

fileLevelNodes.name: OnboardingStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Observable MainActor store that commits completed OnboardingData to SwiftData, persisting every field onto UserProfile and mirroring displayName/appMode into AppState.

fileLevelNodes.name: PairingInviteView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Person-A pairing View that generates an invite code and waits for a partner to join; display-only with all logic delegated to PairingStore.

fileLevelNodes.name: PairingJoinView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Person-B pairing View where the user enters a partner's code to join; display-only with all logic delegated to PairingStore.joinWithCode.

fileLevelNodes.name: PairingSettingsView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Partner-linking settings screen showing current link state and surfacing the invite/join actions when unlinked, reading link state from AppState.

fileLevelNodes.name: PairingStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Observable MainActor store owning the device-pairing flow — generate/regenerate/join/poll lifecycle over PairingService, persisting the couple link to SwiftData and mirroring it into AppState.

fileLevelNodes.name: PlayView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Placeholder Play tab View; in DEBUG builds it hosts a temporary stub-session button that exercises the curated-session insert path against Supabase.

fileLevelNodes.name: ProgressDashboardView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Progress dashboard View showing exploration score, per-category breakdown, and recent activity, sourced from DataStore's streak and session records.

fileLevelNodes.name: CheckInShell.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Full-screen container for the Pulse check-in: PulseGraph fills the top 60% (always visible) while DailyCheckInView slides up in the bottom 40%, with camera bindings owned by PulseWidget.

fileLevelNodes.name: DailyCheckInView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: The 5-question daily check-in panel rendered inside CheckInShell; each pill answer moves liveScore so the live dot animates on the graph above, returning a PulseEntry on completion.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseCanvasScrollView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Pure SwiftUI two-axis ScrollView wrapper for PulseGraph that anchors to the most-recent entry and locks the outer dashboard scroll while a touch is on the graph.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseDotSummary.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Overlay View presenting a single Pulse entry's detail via a spectrum 'burn' that expands from the tapped dot, with ember particles and a smart above/below flip; dismiss collapses the burn back into the dot.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseFullView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Full Pulse history screen (stub) for the Me|Us tab — owns window selection and camera state, hosts a scrollable PulseGraph plus an insights placeholder and a full-screen dot burn summary overlay.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseGraph.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Core drawing primitive for the Pulse capacity timeline — a breathing spectrum EKG line with tier guide lines, tappable tier badges, animated welding sparks on the live segment, and an empty-state heartbeat demo.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseSheetView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Sheet presented from the Pulse home widget — mirrors the widget header, shows streak/avg-tier/trend stats, a window selector and graph card, and a single 'Open in Map' exit.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseWidget.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Compact Pulse timeline widget for the Home dashboard — reads entries from PulseStore, renders a chrome-free graph with a floating tier header, and launches the check-in cover and full-history sheet.

fileLevelNodes.name: PulseStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Observable store owning the local list of daily PulseEntry check-ins, persisting them to UserDefaults with one-entry-per-day dedup and DEBUG preview seeding.

fileLevelNodes.name: TierGuideSheet.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Explanatory sheet presented when a Pulse tier badge is tapped, describing the four capacity tiers — Expansive, Sovereign, Protective, Contracted.

fileLevelNodes.name: PresenceDebugView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: DEBUG-only two-device harness (store + view) that joins a Supabase couple channel via RealtimeSessionService and tracks presence join/leave deltas; throwaway scaffold ahead of the real AirlockStore.

fileLevelNodes.name: SessionPlan.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: SwiftData @Model for a curated couple session plan — ordered card ids with optional per-card and global timers, preset/LDR flags, and a hardcoded stub for early two-device verification.

fileLevelNodes.name: SessionStore.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Brain of the card session flow — owns card navigation, records per-card results, and persists the completed CardSession, CardResults and DeckProgress to SwiftData, then enqueues a Supabase sync.

fileLevelNodes.name: SessionView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Thin render-only card session view driven entirely by SessionStore — shows the current card, progress pips, skip/bookmark/discussed controls, and a session-complete summary.

fileLevelNodes.name: SettingsView.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Settings screen with profile, partner pairing, appearance, privacy, data export and danger-zone sections, plus DEBUG-only presence-debug and logout-reset entries.

fileLevelNodes.name: deck-index.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Manifest listing the available bundled deck content ids — currently just 'the-opener'.

fileLevelNodes.name: the-opener.json
fileLevelNodes.summary: Authored card-deck content file for 'The Opener' deck — the ordered prompt cards a couple plays in a session.

fileLevelNodes.name: Vayl.entitlements
fileLevelNodes.summary: App capability entitlements enabling Sign in with Apple (Default) and complete file data protection (NSFileProtectionComplete).

fileLevelNodes.name: Vayl.plist
fileLevelNodes.summary: Info.plist supplying Supabase URL/anon-key build settings and registering the bundled Clash Display, Switzer, Zodiak, Volkhov and IBM Plex Mono fonts via UIAppFonts.

fileLevelNodes.name: Vayl.storekit
fileLevelNodes.summary: StoreKit test configuration defining the single non-consumable 'Vayl Core Lifetime' product (com.vayl.core.lifetime, $24.99) backing the paywall.

fileLevelNodes.name: CandleIntensityTests.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Unit tests asserting CandleIntensity's ordered cases match the experience-row slots and map to the correct NMStage values.

fileLevelNodes.name: ContextOptionTests.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Unit tests for the reason-based ContextPhase redesign — verifies cell option counts, solo single-anchoring, exploring/experienced set sharing, register derivation, and full RelationshipContext reachability.

fileLevelNodes.name: GettingStartedTests.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Unit tests for GettingStarted.resolve — checks step ordering and active/done/locked states across paired/unpaired and map-completion permutations.

fileLevelNodes.name: MonteRowGeometryTests.swift
fileLevelNodes.summary: Unit test verifying AppLayout.monteFanLayout produces an upright center card, mirror-symmetric outer angles/offsets, and a fan that fits within the screen width.
